summary: The weekly review pulse highlights user concerns around high transaction fees, poor customer support, and issues with the user interface. Users have reported difficulties with depositing funds, delayed refunds, and lack of transparency in fees and charges. The app's constant updates have led to frustration, with many users finding it difficult to navigate the new features. Despite these concerns, some users have praised the app's user-friendly interface and useful features.

quotes: ["I will give 3 star because this app very first time give more cashback but now cashback rate is very low.", "Worst experience. Very high transaction fees. Uninstalling right now.", "INDmoney offers useful features, but constant UI/UX changes make it frustrating to use."]
action_items: ["Simplify and improve the user interface to reduce user frustration and make it easier to navigate", "Address concerns around high transaction fees and lack of transparency in fees and charges", "Enhance customer support to provide timely and effective solutions to user issues"]

email_body: The weekly review pulse highlights user concerns around high transaction fees, poor customer support, and issues with the user interface. Users have reported difficulties with depositing funds, delayed refunds, and lack of transparency in fees and charges.
